title: Dashboard Session Send Existing User Turn
objective: Clone an existing OpenClaw env, move the clone to the target runtime, send a dashboard-style user message through Gateway sessions.send, and measure response latency without mutating the durable source env.

phases.title: Clone Existing Env
phases.intent: Clone a durable existing user env into a disposable Kova env before runtime or message testing.

phases.title: Move Clone To Target Runtime
phases.intent: Run the real OCM upgrade path so the cloned user state runs the requested OpenClaw target runtime.

phases.title: Start Gateway
phases.intent: Start the cloned gateway after upgrade and wait for readiness before sending a dashboard-style message.

phases.title: Dashboard Session Message
phases.intent: Exercise Gateway sessions.send on cloned user state and verify final assistant text appears in chat history.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/run-dashboard-session-send-turn.mjs --env {env} --session-key kova-dashboard-existing-user --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --expected-text KOVA_AGENT_OK --timeout 120000

phases.title: Post-Dashboard Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the cloned gateway remains responsive after the dashboard-style turn and collect logs for embedded-run/liveness evidence.
